{"id":"project-LICHEN-gs3a","title":"schnorr48: redundant length check on s_bytes is dead code","description":"File: python/src/lichen/crypto/schnorr48.py
Lines: 134-135

The check `if len(s_bytes) != 32: return False` is dead code:

```python
if len(pubkey) != 32 or len(sig) != 48:  # Line 126-127
    return False
...
s_bytes = sig[16:48]  # Line 134
if len(s_bytes) != 32:  # Line 135 - ALWAYS FALSE
    return False
```

Since len(sig) == 48 is already verified on line 126-127, sig[16:48] will always be exactly 32 bytes. The check on line 135 can never be True.

Impact: Minor dead code, no functional bug. Remove for clarity.","status":"open","priority":4,"issue_type":"cleanup","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:17:24.900282Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:17:24.900313Z"}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-gs3a","title":"schnorr48: redundant length check on s_bytes is dead code","description":"File: python/src/lichen/crypto/schnorr48.py
Lines: 134-135

The check `if len(s_bytes) != 32: return False` is dead code:

```python
if len(pubkey) != 32 or len(sig) != 48:  # Line 126-127
    return False
...
s_bytes = sig[16:48]  # Line 134
if len(s_bytes) != 32:  # Line 135 - ALWAYS FALSE
    return False
```

Since len(sig) == 48 is already verified on line 126-127, sig[16:48] will always be exactly 32 bytes. The check on line 135 can never be True.

Impact: Minor dead code, no functional bug. Remove for clarity.","notes":"The redundant len(s_bytes) check has already been removed in current code (see verify():174).
